facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 6,291 reviews. And a private beach on Bãi Dài.

Radisson Blu Resort Phú Quốc delivers: outdoor pool, 3 bars, and a beachfront restaurant in the quieter north of the island.

Fewer crowds. More space. The reviews aren't lying.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Private beach, 3 bars, 4.8 stars from 6,291 guests. Radisson Blu Resort Phú Quốc sits on Bãi Dài, the less-crowded stretch locals prefer. Watch the pool deck at golden hour. You'll get it.
